description_long: This is a shallow, circular bowl with a wide, flat rim and a gently sloping interior. The surface appears to be made of a stone-like material, exhibiting a mottled pattern of pale gray and reddish hues, with some visible weathering and discoloration. The underside features a slightly raised circular base, providing stability when placed on flat surfaces. The bowl's finish is matte and rough, suggesting it may have been hand-carved or exposed to the elements over time. There are no visible handles, decorative motifs, or additional features, giving it a utilitarian and rustic appearance. The overall form and material suggest it could be used for serving or holding items in an outdoor or urban environment.
description: A shallow, round stone bowl with a wide flat rim and a rough, weathered surface in pale gray and reddish tones. It has a simple, utilitarian design with no visible decoration.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, flat rim and shallow interior, with mottled gray and reddish coloration.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the bowl's shallow depth and sloping interior walls.
description_view_2: Bottom view revealing the raised circular base and the flatness of the rim.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the shallow profile and rough surface texture.
attribute_location: outdoor communal area or urban park
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food, offerings, or small objects
